raw_title: Advancing a Material and Epistemological Turn in the Study of AI: A Review and New Directions for Journalism Research
title_en: Advancing a Material and Epistemological Turn in the Study of AI: A Review and New Directions for Journalism Research
title_zh: Advancing a Material and Epistemological Turn in the Study of AI: A Review and New Directions for Journalism Research
plain_summary_en: This paper studies Advancing a Material and Epistemological Turn in the Study of AI: A Review and New Directions for Journalism Research. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Journalism, Epistemology, Sociology, Linguistic turn. The abstract suggests a review approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies Advancing a Material and Epistemological Turn in the Study of AI: A Review and New Directions for Journalism Research. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Journalism, Epistemology, Sociology, Linguistic turn. The abstract suggests a review approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around Journalism, Epistemology, Sociology, Linguistic turn, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
research_direction_zh: The paper points to an active research direction around Journalism, Epistemology, Sociology, Linguistic turn, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
